untranslatable_reason: Horn Top pattern requires precise detection of two sequential spike highs with specific relative positioning and price difference comparisons to median. This multi-bar structural pattern with configuration-dependent behavior (left/right spike relationship, inside/outside weeks evaluation) cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern is inherently multi-timeframe and depends on identifying spike peaks relative to surrounding context, which requires pattern recognition beyond available point-in-time indicators.
